zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Danvers於大約1410年出生在英國奧可福爾普雷斯可特時，他的父親John d'Anvers II29歲，母親Alice Verney27歲。他於1445年與Elizabeth Euphemia Langston在英國諾薩普頓史爾列沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1489年2月14日在英國奧可福爾可洛普雷迪享年80歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾可洛普雷迪。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Danvers于大约1410年出生在英国奧可福爾普雷斯可特时，他的父亲John d'Anvers II29岁，母亲Alice Verney27岁。他于1445年与Elizabeth Euphemia Langston在英国諾薩普頓史爾列沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1489年2月14日在英国奧可福爾可洛普雷迪享年80岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾可洛普雷迪。

nameMeanings.name: Danvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Danvers was born about 1410, in Prescote, Oxfordshire, England, his father, John d'Anvers II, was 29 and his mother, Alice Verney, was 27. He married Elizabeth Euphemia Langston in 1445, in Culworth, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 14 February 1489, in Cropredy, Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 80, and was buried in Cropredy, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Danvers est né environ 1410, à Prescote, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John d'Anvers II, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Alice Verney, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Euphemia Langston en 1445, à Culworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 14 février 1489, à Cropredy, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans, et a été enterré à Cropredy, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Danvers um 1410 in Prescote, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John d'Anvers II 29 und seine Mutter Alice Verney 27. Er hat 1445 in Culworth, Northamptonshire, England Elizabeth Euphemia Langston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 14. Februar 1489 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Cropredy, Oxfordshire, England und wurde in Cropredy, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Danvers è nato il circa 1410 nel Prescote, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, John d'Anvers II, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Alice Verney, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Euphemia Langston nel 1445, nel Culworth, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 febbraio 1489, nel Cropredy, Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 80 anni, e fu sepolto a Cropredy, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Danversが約1410年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアプレスコトで生まれた時，父John d'Anvers IIは29歳，母Alice Verneyは27歳であった。1445年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアクウルウオルスでElizabeth Euphemia Langstonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1489年2月14日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアクロプレディで80歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアクロプレディにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Danvers(이)가 대략 1410년 영국 스퍼드실르 프레스컷에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John d'Anvers II(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Verney(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1445년 영국 노르섬프토실르 컬워스에서 Elizabeth Euphemia Langston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1489년 2월 14일 영국 스퍼드실르 크럽레디에서 80세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 크럽레디에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Danvers nasceu aproximadamente 1410, em Prescote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John d'Anvers II, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Alice Verney, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Euphemia Langston em 1445, em Culworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 14 de fevereiro de 1489, em Cropredy, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 80 anos, e foi sepultado em Cropredy, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Danvers родился около 1410 г. в местности прескот, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John d'Anvers II было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Verney, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Euphemia Langston в 1445 г. в местности кулворт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 14 февраля 1489 г. в местности кропреди, оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 80 лет и был похоронен в местности кропреди, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Richard Danvers nació aproximadamente 1410, en Prescote, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John d'Anvers II, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Alice Verney, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Euphemia Langston en 1445, en Culworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de febrero de 1489, en Cropredy, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 80 años, y fue sepultado en Cropredy, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
